name: specshift
description: Spec-driven development workflow — every feature produces research, specs, architecture, quality checks, changelogs, and user docs alongside code.

interface.shortDescription: Spec-driven workflow: research, propose, apply, finalize, review.
interface.longDescription: Use SpecShift to guide the agent through a structured change lifecycle: research, proposal, specs, design, preflight checks, tests, tasks, audit, finalization, and PR review. Each change produces traceable artifacts so the why and the how stay with the code.
defaultPrompt: Use SpecShift to propose a new change.
